features.name: hierarchical reference inside named begin block in function
features.description: Code should include a function containing a named begin block with a hierarchical reference to a signal in another module

features.name: dotted path reference to sibling module signal inside function
features.description: Code should include a dotted hierarchical path accessing a signal from a sibling module instance inside a function

features.name: function with labeled begin block accessing module hierarchy
features.description: Code should include a function with a labeled begin block where the function accesses module hierarchy through a parent module reference
